content: Cross-document duplicate clustering: MinHash+LSH banding splits signatures into b bands of r rows; identical band hashes bucket together, giving O(n) candidate generation instead of O(n^2) all-pairs. Tune (b,r) to a Jaccard threshold. For coordinated-spam detection across pubkeys, can also use exact content hash (SHA/xxhash of normalized text) as the cheapest first pass to find identical text shared by many distinct authors; SimHash bucketing (prefix bands) catches near-identical templated variants. The spam-clusters spike confirmed exact-value collisions across distinct pubkeys are the cleanest coordination signal.
